description: Canada eTA submission guide screenshot metadata

screenshots.title: Canada eTA Eligibility Checker
screenshots.notes: Users select their nationality to check eTA requirements

screenshots.title: Start eTA Application
screenshots.notes: Users click 'Start Application' to begin the process

screenshots.title: Passport Information
screenshots.notes: Passport must be valid for entire stay

screenshots.title: Contact Information
screenshots.notes: eTA confirmation will be sent to this email

screenshots.title: Travel Information
screenshots.description: Purpose of visit and funding details
screenshots.notes: Be honest about travel purpose and funding

screenshots.title: Background Questions
screenshots.notes: Most travelers answer 'No' to all questions

screenshots.title: Review and Submit
screenshots.notes: Carefully review all information before submitting

screenshots.title: Payment Processing
screenshots.description: Credit card payment for CAD $7 fee
screenshots.notes: Fee is required regardless of approval or denial

screenshots.title: eTA Confirmation
screenshots.notes: eTA is electronically linked to passport - no physical document needed

tips: Complete application in one session - cannot save progress
Most applications are approved within minutes
eTA is valid for 5 years or until passport expires
Multiple entries allowed - up to 6 months each visit
Only use canada.ca - avoid third-party sites with extra fees

commonIssues.solution: Complete form quickly in one session
Double-check all passport details match exactly
Check spam folder, ensure email address is correct
Try different credit card or contact bank
Answer all citizenship questions honestly and completely
